$comment: Shared TS config. Every service/lib has its own tsconfig that extends this one — single source of truth (no config drift). The `paths` block below is what gives @nx/enforce-module-boundaries its teeth: without it Nx can't resolve @zippy/* and silently SKIPS the tag depConstraints. Values MUST start with `./` (relative to this file) — bare paths trigger TS5090 since there's no baseUrl. Add a `@zippy/<name>` line here when you add a lib or service.
